popularStory.headline: John Sutton, 3rd Baron Dudley
popularStory.description:
Sir John Sutton 3rd Baron Dudley
•Born: 1495, Denbigh, Denbighshire, Wales
•Marriage: Cicely Grey about 1520
•Died: 18 Apr 1553, Westminster, London, Middlesex, England at age 58
•Buried: 18 Sep 1553 …

zh.Bradenlove, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾
zh.Lyncheslade, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Dudley Esq.於大約1473年出生在英國戴文阿黑林頓時，他的父親John Dudley Esq.45歲，母親Elizabeth Bramshott30歲。他於1494年與Anne Windsor在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1510年8月18日在英國倫敦享年38歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦。

zh-hans.Lyncheslade, Buckinghamshire, England: 英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmund Dudley Esq.于大约1473年出生在英国戴文阿黑林頓时，他的父亲John Dudley Esq.45岁，母亲Elizabeth Bramshott30岁。他于1494年与Anne Windsor在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1510年8月18日在英国倫敦享年38岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Dudley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (West Midlands): habitational name from Dudley in Worcestershire, recorded as Duddeleye, Doddeleye in the 13th and 14th centuries, named from the Old English personal name Dudda (see Dodd 1) + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

Irish (southern Ireland): in Ireland, when not the English name, it was adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Ó Dubhdáleithe ‘descendant of Dubhdáleithe’, a personal name composed of the elements dubh ‘black’ + dá ‘two’ + léithe ‘sides’.

variants.name: Dowdall
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish John Patrick, Niall.
Irish (Dublin, Meath, and Louth): English surname adopted by bearers of Gaelic Ó Dubhdáleithe (see Dudley 2).

variants.name: Dagley
meanings: English: variant of Dadley, itself a variant of Dudley , with dissimilation of d-d to d-g.
Americanized form of German Dägele (see Dagle ) or Degele, from a short form of any of several ancient Germanic personal names formed with Old High German diot ‘people, nation’.

variants.name: Dodd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Dodd(e), Dudd(e), Old English Dodd(a), Dudd(a), a name of uncertain origin which remained in fairly widespread and frequent use from Lincolnshire to Devon and from Essex to Lancashire in England until the 14th century.

English: nickname from Middle English dod, a word of uncertain meaning, possibly a ‘lumpish, thickset person’ (compare modern English dialect dod ‘bunch or heap’), or by extension a ‘foolish person’ (compare Middle English dode-mused ‘stupid’), or perhaps a derivative of dodden ‘to shave (the head), to trim (hair)’, hence ‘the hairless or close-cropped one’.

English: possibly a modern variant of Daud or Dowd, the former arising from the Middle English personal name Daud(e), an extended form of Daw , and the latter from the Middle English personal name Doude, perhaps a side-form of either Dodde or of Daude, a pet form of Ralph .

variants.name: Diddle
meanings: English: possibly a variant of   Dudley  . Compare   Aduddell  .
In some cases possibly also an Americanized form of German   Dittel  .

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Dudley Esq. was born about 1473, in Atherington, Devon, England, his father, John Dudley Esq., was 45 and his mother, Elizabeth Bramshott, was 30. He married Anne Windsor in 1494, in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 18 August 1510, in London, England, at the age of 38, and was buried in London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund Dudley Esq. est né environ 1473, à Atherington, Devon, Angleterre, son père, John Dudley Esq., avait 45 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Bramshott, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Anne Windsor en 1494, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 18 août 1510, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund Dudley Esq. um 1473 in Atherington, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Dudley Esq. 45 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Bramshott 30. Er hat 1494 in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Anne Windsor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 18. August 1510 im Alter von 38 Jahren in London, England und wurde in London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Dudley Esq. è nato il circa 1473 nel Atherington, Devon, England, il suo padre, John Dudley Esq., aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Bramshott, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Anne Windsor nel 1494, nel Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 18 agosto 1510, nel London, England, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Edmund Dudley Esq.が約1473年にイギリスデボンアスエリントンで生まれた時，父John Dudley Esq.は45歳，母Elizabeth Bramshottは30歳であった。1494年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアでAnne Windsorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1510年8月18日にイギリスロンドンで38歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Dudley Esq.(이)가 대략 1473년 영국 데폰 앳헤링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Dudley Esq.(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Bramshott(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1494년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르에서 Anne Windsor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1510년 8월 18일 영국 런던에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Dudley Esq. nasceu aproximadamente 1473, em Atherington, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Dudley Esq., tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Bramshott, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Windsor em 1494, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 18 de agosto de 1510, em London, Inglaterra, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Dudley Esq. родился около 1473 г. в местности атирингтон, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени John Dudley Esq. было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Bramshott, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Windsor в 1494 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 18 августа 1510 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edmund Dudley Esq. nació aproximadamente 1473, en Atherington, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, John Dudley Esq., tenía 45 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Bramshott, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Anne Windsor en 1494, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 18 de agosto de 1510, en London, Inglaterra, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
